ab: kai vaiyana ko sinsi iloko naiya mwa tala’ola’owa ki lagolagolay, yalangai nai sa kipo la tilribi nai ikai ki sawlatadra.
ch: 今天老師帶我們去動物園，我們在門口排隊買票。
en: Today the teacher took us to the zoo, and we lined up at the gate to buy tickets.

ab: sa modaanenga nai, ko sinsi laelraela naiya, “kai cocobonga ka lazazame, kai lrikodranga ka laolawlay, angikamaniyata ceele si siyavava.”
ch: 進入動物園後，老師說:「前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。」
en: After entering the zoo, the teacher said, "There are birds in the front and snakes in the back, so you can visit them yourself."

ab: mwakolodrako ki olawlay, amanisa nako kiyaomaw mwa ceele laolawlay.
ch: 我會怕蛇，所以我不看蛇類。
en: I'm afraid of snakes, so I don't look at snakes.

ab: waceelako makalra azazame, yabeleng ki angato aniya’ala’alay, si waceelako loo yakai barongolo ’adring ki angato wa’e’ece.
ch: 我看到了很多鳥，他們在樹上飛來飛去，還有看到貓頭鷹在樹洞裡睡覺。
en: I saw a lot of birds flying around in the trees and saw owls sleeping in tree hollows.

ab: kai tala’ola’owa ki golagolay yakai ka zoo, baa si lrikolaw, nakowaceelana kai lagolagolay saiyana, kai vaiyana waceelanganako matiyakiraragai kidremedrameli.
ch: 動物園裡有大象、馬和老虎，我從前沒有看過這些動物，今天看到了真的很開心。
en: There are elephants, horses and tigers in the zoo. I have never seen these animals before. I was really happy to see them today.

ab: la sasiyasingako makalra ka sasing, ai bwaiyako ’aceele ki marodrawdrang.
ch: 我拍了很多照片，給爸爸媽媽看。
en: I took a lot of pictures and showed them to my parents.

ab: lo abilrilinga ai maelrelreako si marodraodrang anivalre kela.
ch: 下次要跟爸爸媽媽一起來。
en: Next time I will come with my parents.
